mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0%, labor market slack signals weakening consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 4.0%, or the signal loses predictive power with p > 0.05 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in new home sales and existing home sales indicate robust household balance sheets and demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint housing signal fails to produce a positive rank IC over 60-day horizons, or housing demand diverges from equity performance without predictive correlation.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, a decline in the index of industrial production below its 2017 baseline confirms supply-side contraction and inventory drawdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Industrial production declines during tightening cycles do not correlate with negative 5-day equity returns, or the signal reverses direction in easing regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index crosses above 310, persistent inflation forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite CPIAUCSL readings above 310, or the threshold fails to separate positive and negative return regimes with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms labor market tightening and wage growth, supporting corporate revenue expansion and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces no incremental predictive power over single-series models, or forward returns turn negative when both conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic output and corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to predict equity direction with a rank IC above 0.01, or positive GDP revisions coincide with negative 60-day market returns.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production crosses above 102, manufacturing capacity utilization rises and supply chains normalize, reducing input cost pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: High industrial production levels do not precede positive 5-day equity returns, or the signal loses efficacy when supply chain disruptions dominate market pricing.
